title: RSW Who Am I? Christmas Games Crackers 6 Fun Family Dinner Table Game Cracker 9 Inch, Blue & White
description: Pack of 6 Who Am I Christmas games crackers. Complete your festive dinner with one of these fun festive games crackers. This pack of six festive games crackers contain a fun Who am I game, great family fun for all! Each cracker measures approximately 22cm x 4cm and has a festive snowflake print on a festive white and blue background, finished with a red and white stripe string tie. A modern coloured cracker makes the crackers suitable for any Christmas colour scheme and will look perfect with any Christmas table setting whether it be a small Christmas lunch to a full family Christmas dinner. Each cracker contains a hat, motto, snap and the box contains 6 Gonk headbands and 24 who am I cards. The crackers are 100% recyclable including the packaging and have no acetate window, helping you to be ecofriendly all year round.
